lines.speaker: Aisles
lines.text: Hello. Do you wish me to exchange banknotes for you? I charge only 5 coins for each banknote.

lines.speaker: Aisles
lines.text: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.

lines.speaker: Aisles
lines.text: I am Aisles. I can exchange banknotes for real items. Do you want any banknotes converted?

sections.title: Using something that isn't a banknote

lines.speaker: Aisles
lines.text: I exchange banknotes for real items. That's not a banknote.

sections.title: If the player does not have enough money

lines.speaker: Aisles
lines.text: I charge 5 coins for exchanging each banknote.

sections.title: If the player has enough money
